# GTLNAV — autogenerated generic Node.js Dockerfile.
# Injected when a Node server framework (Express, Koa, Fastify, Hapi, Nest)
# is detected and no Dockerfile is present in the repo.
#
# Build args:
#   NODE_VERSION   default: 20-alpine
#   PORT           default: 3000

FROM node:${NODE_VERSION}

ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV PORT=${PORT}

RUN addgroup -S gtlnav && adduser -S gtlnav -G gtlnav
WORKDIR /app

# Layer-cache dependency install.
COPY package.json ./
COPY package-lock.json* ./
COPY pnpm-lock.yaml* ./
COPY yarn.lock* ./
RUN if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then npm i -g pnpm@9 && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile=false; \
    elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then npm i -g yarn && yarn install; \
    else npm install --no-audit --no-fund; fi

COPY . .

# Run build if the project declares one.
RUN if grep -q '"build"' package.json; then \
      if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then pnpm run build; \
      elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then yarn build; \
      else npm run build; fi; \
    fi

USER gtlnav
EXPOSE ${PORT}

CMD ["sh", "-c", "if grep -q '\"start\"' package.json; then npm start; else node server.js; fi"]
